name: Australia
plain_words: GST at 10% on what you sell. Register when revenue passes A$75,000. Company tax 25% (base rate entities) or 30%. Individual tax progressive 0% to 45%. Medicare levy 2%. Super guarantee 11.5%.

taxes.name: GST
taxes.plain_words: Goods and Services Tax at 10%. Register when revenue passes A$75,000. Lodge Business Activity Statement (BAS) monthly or quarterly.
taxes.notes: Flat 10%. Some goods are GST-free (basic food, health, education).

deadlines.name: bas_quarterly
deadlines.detail: Lodge BAS within 28 days after quarter ends
deadlines.penalty: Failure to lodge on time (FTL) penalty

taxes.name: Company Tax
taxes.plain_words: Company tax at 25% for base rate entities (turnover under A$50M), 30% for others. File annual return with ATO.
taxes.notes: Base rate entity: aggregated turnover less than A$50 million. Rate reduced to 25% from FY2022.

deadlines.name: annual_return
deadlines.detail: Lodge company return by date specified by ATO

taxes.name: Individual Income Tax
taxes.plain_words: Progressive 0% to 45%. Tax-free threshold A$18,200. Medicare levy 2% on top. Super guarantee 11.5% paid by employer.
taxes.notes: Resident rates. Non-residents taxed from first dollar. Medicare levy 2% of taxable income above threshold.

deadlines.name: lodgement
deadlines.detail: Lodge tax return by 31 October (or later with registered agent)

taxes.name: Super Guarantee
taxes.plain_words: Employers must pay 11.5% of ordinary time earnings into a super fund. Rising to 12% by July 2025.

deadlines.name: quarterly_payment
deadlines.detail: Pay super by 28 days after quarter ends
deadlines.penalty: Super Guarantee Charge including interest and admin fee
